# The Basics of Regression Modelling {regression-basics}

```{r regression-basics-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/regression-basics-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/regression-basics/"
)
```

```{r child-regression-basics, child="../lecture-content/02-regression-basics.Rmd"}
```
